locations.description: Section 1 goal, requirements summary, and assumptions.
Architectural style, tech stack, components, data model, API style.
List of planned diagrams/specs with formats and iteration references.
Proposed repository layout with comments for docs/api/config.
Command discipline, gating, security, governance, and testing rules.
Total iterations, dependency summary, cadence, and collaboration notes.
Iteration 1 objectives, deliverables, risks, metrics, and exit criteria.
I1.T1: Scaffold oclif CLI, build scripts, Docker, CI skeleton.
I1.T2: RepoConfig schema + init command implementation.
I1.T3: Component diagram PlantUML artifact + doc.
I1.T4: Mermaid ERD and data dictionary.
I1.T5: Feature lifecycle state machine diagram + guide.
I1.T6: Run-directory scaffolding, hash manifest helpers, documentation.
I1.T7: Observability/log schemas and guide.
I1.T8: Security/governance ADR and PAT guidance.
I1.T9: Sample dogfood run + cleanup scripts.
Iteration 2 goals covering context intelligence and artifact authoring.
I2.T1: Context aggregator implementation + tests.
I2.T2: OpenAPI spec draft and contract guide.
I2.T3: ResearchTask coordinator + runbook.
I2.T4: Prompt-to-deploy sequence diagram + explanation.
I2.T5: Context budgeting guide + schema.
I2.T6: PRD authoring engine + approvals wiring.
I2.T7: Spec composer service + doc.
I2.T8: Approval registry module + CLI integration.
I2.T9: Full start command integration with telemetry.
I2.T10: Linear snapshot adapter with rate-limit awareness.
I2.T11: Status command enhancements and schema doc.
Iteration 3 objectives for adapters, planner, execution engine.
I3.T1: Shared HTTP client with rate-limit ledger and retry logic.
I3.T2: GitHub adapter (repo/branch/PR/reviewer/merge).
I3.T3: Adapter capability manifest schema + samples.
I3.T4: Validation registry schema + loader.
I3.T5: Task planner generating DAG + checksum.
I3.T6: Execution queue store + doc.
I3.T7: Execution engine enforcing patch workflow + validations.
I3.T8: Agent adapter implementing manifest-driven provider selection.
I3.T9: Resume coordinator enhancements.
I3.T10: Plan/run CLI wiring for DAG visualization + targeted execution.
I3.T11: Adapter contract tests + fixture refresh docs.
Iteration 4 plan covering CLI UX, approvals, PR/deploy commands.
I4.T1: CLI renderer/tokens module.
I4.T2: Status command UX + snapshot tests.
I4.T3: Resume CLI enhancements and JSON output.
I4.T4: PR command suite (create/reviewers/status/auto-merge).
I4.T5: Deploy CLI hooking to deployment trigger module.
I4.T6: Notification adapter stubs with throttling.
I4.T7: Observe command producing KPI reports.
I4.T8: Export CLI enhancements with redaction checks.
I4.T9: Command reference + README updates.
I4.T10: Interactive approval prompts with fallback editor support.
I4.T11: Cleanup CLI for retention + archives.
Iteration 5 plan for deployment automation, reliability, compliance.
I5.T1: Deployment trigger service with status check polling.
I5.T2: Rate-limit + deployment playbooks.
I5.T3: Compliance-ready export bundle builder.
I5.T4: KPI exporter for queue/retry/cost metrics.
I5.T5: Compliance checklist + governance notes.
I5.T6: Rate-limit alert monitor + notification hooks.
I5.T7: Deployment logging + notification enrichment.
I5.T8: Diagnostics command bundling sanitized telemetry.
I5.T9: Cleanup retention integration tests and doc updates.
I5.T10: Pilot dry-run outputs, release notes, backlog triage.
Testing levels, CI/CD flow, code quality gates, artifact validation.
Definitions for key workflow terms (approval registry, artifact bundle, etc.).
